Package org.eventb.core.sc.state

Interface ISCState

All Superinterfaces:
IState
All Known Subinterfaces:
IAbstractEventInfo, IAbstractEventTable, IAbstractMachineInfo, IAccuracyInfo, IConcreteEventInfo, IConcreteEventTable, IContextAccuracyInfo, IContextLabelSymbolTable, IContextPointerArray, IContextTable, IConvergenceInfo, IEventLabelSymbolTable, IIdentifierSymbolTable, ILabelSymbolTable, IMachineAccuracyInfo, IMachineLabelSymbolTable, IParsedFormula, IReservedNameTable, IVariantInfo, IVariantPresentInfo, IVariantUsedInfo
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractEventInfo, AbstractEventTable, AbstractMachineInfo, AccuracyInfo, ConcreteEventInfo, ConcreteEventTable, ContextAccuracyInfo, ContextLabelSymbolTable, ContextPointerArray, ContextTable, ConvergenceInfo, EventLabelSymbolTable, IdentifierSymbolTable, MachineAccuracyInfo, MachineLabelSymbolTable, ParsedFormula, ReservedNameTable, StackedIdentifierSymbolTable, VariantPresentInfo, VariantUsedInfo
public interface ISCState extends IState
All static checker state components must inherit from this interface.

Clients that need to contribute to the SC state repository ISCStateRepository must implement this interface for all contributed state components.

Since:
1.0
